name: frontend-only
description: Frontend app consuming an external API or third-party services — no backend or database in this repo
productSnippet: Frontend-only app. Consumes an external API or third-party services (Stripe, Supabase, Shopify, etc.). No backend or database managed by this repo.

architectureHints.systemStyle: Single-page app or static site with client-side data fetching
architectureHints.dataPattern: API client layer (lib/api.ts) wrapping external API. React Query or SWR for caching.
architectureHints.apiStyle: Consuming external — document the external API contract in spec/api/
architectureHints.frontendState: Zustand or React Query for server state, local state for UI
architectureHints.errorStrategy: ApiError class, error boundaries per page, toast notifications for mutations

commonPatterns: Typed API client wrapping external service (lib/api.ts)
React Query or SWR for data fetching and caching
Environment variables for external API keys (NEXT_PUBLIC_* only for client-safe keys)
Server components for initial data load, client components for interactivity
Loading skeletons and error boundaries on every async page
externalServiceNotes: Stripe: use server actions for payment intents — never expose secret key to browser
Supabase: use Row Level Security — never bypass with service role key on the client
Shopify Storefront API: use public storefront token, not admin token
External API keys that are truly public: NEXT_PUBLIC_* is fine
Any secret key: must go through a server action or API route — never in browser bundle
quickStartPrompts: Build a Next.js app that uses Stripe for payments
Build a storefront using the Shopify Storefront API
Build a dashboard that reads from a public API
